response.overview: In Katjuri Colony, an isolated and decaying street in Jamshedpur, a small, Colony. Subhojeet, a young local, entered an abandoned house with 4 friends. They were curious about the rumors of a "shadow that follows" and a "Soul Nail" buried inside the walls. No one knows exactly what happened inside - but only two of them came back. The survivors claimed they couldn't remember what happened to Subhojeet... only that the house "pushed them out" and locked itself. They All Vanished From There But Dhanraj Was Trapped. They Came To Know About Baak And 6 June Mystery. In Ending Something Terrifying Occurred.
response.title: Andheron Ka Sayya
